name: screen-guardian
description: Ultra-light compatibility-first AI screen access with fallback adapters.

interface.shortDescription: 不强迫升级的超轻量 AI 屏幕访问。
interface.longDescription: Screen Guardian is freedom-preserving capability infrastructure for personal AI. This release adds an AI capability runtime with registered commands and a disabled-by-default break-glass local execution path, while preserving feature flags, runtime limits, local-only defaults, and explicit user confirmation for raw execution.
defaultPrompt: Check Screen Guardian readiness with guardian_check.
Use guardian_perceive for a quick local look.
Capture after a short delay or wait for a window to finish rendering.
Watch a window briefly for visual changes.
Turn an optional capability on or off.
Check whether audio capture is available.
Prepare a workflow envelope with guardian_prepare_workflow.
